scope: Public technical ability patterns only. Descriptive analysis, not operational replication.

core_model.summary: Riley Walz's public technical edge is the combination of public-client observation, data-seam detection, state-change inference, cheap collector design, one-screen productization, and method framing.
above_average_combination: selecting culturally charged public data sources
choosing the right public interface shape
using public reaction as project feedback

technical_instincts.name: Public-client reconnaissance
technical_instincts.description: Observe how a normal public browser/app session retrieves data, then reason about the public data contract behind the interface.
technical_instincts.safe_use: Use passive observation, official APIs, documented exports, and public records. Stop at authentication and access-control boundaries.

technical_instincts.name: Data seam detection
technical_instincts.description: Identify public interface behavior that exposes more structure than the original UI makes legible.
technical_instincts.safe_use: Analyze seam category and risks. Do not enumerate or harvest sensitive records at scale.

technical_instincts.name: State-change inference
technical_instincts.description: Observe public state over time and infer real-world events from deltas.
technical_instincts.safe_use: Label as inferred, document alternate explanations, and aggregate when people could be affected.

technical_instincts.name: Hardware client wrapping
technical_instincts.description: Use cheap hardware and commodity apps/models as data-producing components instead of rebuilding hard recognition systems.
technical_instincts.safe_use: Publish derived metadata only, avoid raw audio/video retention, review recording and privacy rules.

technical_instincts.name: Creative archival mining
technical_instincts.description: Use default metadata and historical platform behaviors to discover public accidental archives.
technical_instincts.safe_use: Provide takedown paths, avoid vulnerable content, and store indexes rather than rehosting content when possible.

technical_instincts.name: Thin productization
technical_instincts.description: Collapse data into a single interface: map, feed, archive, dashboard, familiar UI clone, or game.
technical_instincts.safe_use: Make provenance, caveats, and non-affiliation visible in the interface.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Predictable public identifier pattern in a public citation/payment workflow, converted into map-based operational visibility.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Recognized that identifier structure and event timing exposed a city operation pattern.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Use delayed, aggregated enforcement-density trends without individual worker identifiers.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Cheap public-space sensor using commodity music recognition and a public feed.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Wrapped existing recognition tech in low-cost hardware and made a new cultural data stream.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Retain only song metadata, avoid raw audio, disclose method and review local laws.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Default filename search across a massive public video platform, filtered into a nostalgic archive.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Recognized default metadata as an archival index and applied filters that preserved emotional signal.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Index public URLs with takedown process and content filtering rather than amplifying sensitive material.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Public catalog inventory polling with checkout inference from availability deltas.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Converted a static availability field into an event stream with persistence and conservative polling.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Aggregate or delay by category/time window to reduce community privacy exposure.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Reservation inventory inference paired with geospatial visualization.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Turned a consumer booking workflow into public operational context with caveats.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Label estimates, add uncertainty ranges, cache responsibly, and avoid operationally sensitive outputs.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Public camera feed to object detection to multimodal clothing classification to aggregate dashboard.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Used a narrow visual proxy rather than building a general weather model.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: No identifiable frame retention; aggregate outputs only with strict privacy review.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Official public records request plus map, caller-origin verification, leaderboard, and voicemail artifacts.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Combined lawful data acquisition with physical-world validation and gamification.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Include stale-location warnings, no-trespass rules, moderation, and event time bounds.

project_case_studies.technical_pattern: Public document ingestion, parsing, search, and familiar inbox-style interface.
project_case_studies.ability_signal: Identified interface as the bottleneck in understanding a public document corpus.
project_case_studies.safer_transfer: Preserve provenance, redactions, sensitive-party protections, and sober framing.

source_hunting_order: open-data portals and public records request references
red_lines: no non-consensual biometric or attractiveness scoring
no raw audio/video retention guidance for public bystanders
required_plan_fields: collection method at safe abstraction level
